name: Triage Gate
description: Uses a cheap model to decide if the bot should respond in group chats before the main model runs. Saves 75-90% of group chat token costs.

triageModel.description: Model to use for triage decisions, in provider/model format.

triagePrompt.description: Custom prompt for triage decisions. Must instruct the model to reply with RESPOND or SKIP.

groups.description: Only apply triage to these group IDs. Empty means all groups.

excludeGroups.description: Skip triage for these group IDs (always let messages through).

maxTriageTokens.description: Max output tokens for the triage model response.

logDecisions.description: Whether to log each triage decision.

bypassKeywords.description: Keywords that bypass triage entirely. Messages containing any keyword (case-insensitive) always get a response.

useConfidenceScores.description: When true, the triage model returns a 1-10 confidence score instead of binary RESPOND/SKIP.

confidenceThreshold.description: Confidence threshold (1-10). Messages scoring at or above this value proceed to the main model. Only used when useConfidenceScores is true.

historyCount.description: Number of recent group messages to include in the triage prompt for context. Default: 0 (disabled), max: 20.

triageModel.label: Triage Model
triageModel.help: Model for triage decisions (e.g. anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5, minimax/minimax-m2.5). Default: anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5-20251001

triagePrompt.label: Triage Prompt
triagePrompt.help: Custom prompt that tells the triage model when to RESPOND vs SKIP

groups.label: Groups
groups.help: Group IDs to apply triage to (empty = all groups)

excludeGroups.label: Exclude Groups
excludeGroups.help: Group IDs to skip triage for (messages always proceed to main model)

maxTriageTokens.label: Max Triage Tokens
maxTriageTokens.help: Max output tokens for triage response (default: 10)

logDecisions.label: Log Decisions
logDecisions.help: Log each triage decision to the plugin logger (default: true)

bypassKeywords.label: Bypass Keywords
bypassKeywords.help: Keywords that bypass triage entirely — messages containing any keyword always get a response (case-insensitive)

useConfidenceScores.label: Use Confidence Scores
useConfidenceScores.help: Use 1-10 confidence scoring instead of binary RESPOND/SKIP (default: false)

confidenceThreshold.label: Confidence Threshold
confidenceThreshold.help: Minimum confidence score (1-10) required for the bot to respond (default: 5)

historyCount.label: History Count
historyCount.help: Number of recent messages to include in the triage prompt for context (default: 0, max: 20)
